form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr7) over 2300m at this track was 8th-16.9 at the bell, beaten 6 m by South Seas Rock (2:44.70) in NR up to 95 on March 27 at $21. At his previous start 6th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track was 8th-17.25 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Captain Bellasario (1:52.00) in NR up to 105 on March 21 at $71. Draws the pegs and could be more competitive from there.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 5th (Fr3) over 1609m after showing early pace at this track was leading by 1.73 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Michaywey (1:51.80) in NR up to 85 on March 21 at $1.25. The run previous 7th (Fr4) over 1609m at this track beaten 20 m by Captains Mistress (1:48.90) in 4yo LR No NR on February 28 at $19. Best form should see him in the finish.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was well back in the run when 6th (Fr8) over 1609m after racing wide at this track, at the bell was 10th-19.95 beaten 7 m by Hugo Maguire (1:51.30) in No NR on March 27 at $19. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 2 m (Fr9) at this track (1:52.00) beating Hugo Maguire in NR up to 85 on March 21 at $18 at the bell was 3rd-4.31. Use the win two back as a guide to his prospects.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing fourth behind Perfect Stranger at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 85 on March 21 at $11. Then a handy effort when beaten by 7 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Heeza Malteeza at this track over 2300m in a NR up to 80 on March 27 at $8.50. Draws out but has top-four prospects.
